summary: Complete golf competition app testing - all core functionality verified working including Stableford scoring, handicap tracking, and multi-round competitions
passed_tests: Backend API (20/20 endpoints) - All CRUD operations for players, competitions, rounds, scores
Players page - add, edit handicap, toggle active status
Competition page - tabs, player management, rounds creation
Score entry page - hole-by-hole input with Stableford calculation
Leaderboard display with correct ranking by Stableford points
